def negative_distributed_trace_span_created_without_parent_context_propagation():
    rule_id = "distributed_trace_span_created_without_parent_context_propagation"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "OpenTelemetry or custom trace span created without extracting the parent context from the incoming request."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
